def calculate_shipping(order):
    if order.destination.country == "US":
        if order.weight > 50:
            if order.priority == "express":
                if order.insurance:
                    if order.destination.state == "HI" or order.destination.state == "AK":
                        return 45.00
                    else:
                        return 35.00
                else:
                    return 25.00
            elif order.priority == "standard":
                return 15.00
            else:
                return 10.00
        else:
            if order.priority == "express":
                return 12.00
            else:
                return 5.00
    elif order.destination.country == "CA":
        if order.weight > 50:
            return 30.00
        else:
            return 20.00
    else:
        if order.weight > 50:
            return 60.00
        else:
            return 40.00
